entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A grain legume (Cicer arietinum L.) whose production is threatened by drought and heat stress

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water scarcity that threatens the production of chickpea

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of high temperature that threatens the production of chickpea

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: A crop improvement strategy used to enhance chickpea resilience

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: A crop improvement strategy involving the study of the genome to enhance chickpea resilience

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: A crop improvement strategy focusing on the functions and processes of the plant

entities.name: AGRONOMY
entities.description: A crop improvement strategy focusing on field management and production

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the plant that confer adaptation to drought and heat

entities.name: DROUGHT ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of chickpea to survive and produce under drought conditions

entities.name: HEAT ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of chickpea to survive and produce under heat stress conditions

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring and analyzing the physical and physiological traits of the plant

entities.name: CANOPY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and structure of the upper part of the plant

entities.name: ROOT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and structure of the underground part of the plant

entities.name: MULTI-TRAIT GENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: An approach using genomic data and multiple traits to predict plant performance

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING PLATFORMS
entities.description: Technology used to rapidly assay physiological traits in large populations

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the genetic value of a crop population over time
